title: Login Session Expired Automatically
description: User gets logged out automatically within a few minutes after login.

title: Card Payment Declined
description: Customer’s debit card payment was declined despite sufficient balance.

title: Unable to Change Password
description: User receives an unknown error while trying to change account password.

title: Billing Address Not Updating
description: Customer updated billing address but old address still appears.

title: Mobile App Crash on Android
description: App crashes immediately after launch on Android 13 devices.

title: Refund Not Received
description: Refund requested 7 days ago but not yet processed.

title: OTP Not Sending
description: Customer not receiving OTP for two-factor authentication.

title: Subscription Renewal Failed
description: Auto-renewal failed even though payment method is valid.

title: Invoice Email Not Delivered
description: Customer did not receive invoice email after purchase.

title: Profile Picture Upload Error
description: User gets upload failed error while updating profile picture.

title: Dashboard Data Not Loading
description: Dashboard shows blank screen after login.

title: Order Status Not Updating
description: Order status remains pending even after successful delivery.
